paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over a 20-session window. The price quote is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's stock performance, governance concerns, and financing transactions. A filing with the SEC disclosed the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and the setup of an Interim Office of the CEO. Retail traders have expressed bullish sentiment on the company despite a sharp selloff. The company has also completed a $375 million offering of convertible senior notes and announced the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns.

There have been 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson.
